channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 Nightmare-Eclipse/BlueHammer (564 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Nightmare-Eclipse

📝 Repository: Nightmare-Eclipse/BlueHammer

📄 Descrizione: Repository hosting the bluehammer vulnerability

⭐ Stelle: 564

🍴 Forks: 212

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-02T23:38:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-08T04:22:33Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 incursi0n/GodPotatoBOF (186 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: incursi0n

📝 Repository: incursi0n/GodPotatoBOF

📄 Descrizione: Cobalt Strike BOF used to perform privilege escalation by exploiting the SeImpersonate privilege. Based on the original GodPotato PoC by BeichenDream.

⭐ Stelle: 186

🍴 Forks: 20

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-10T17:33:37Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-16T03:04:13Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 incursi0n/BlueSAM (137 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: incursi0n

📝 Repository: incursi0n/BlueSAM

item.title: 📝 technoherder/BlueHammerFix (44 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: technoherder

📝 Repository: technoherder/BlueHammerFix

📄 Descrizione: Analysis and detection engineering for the BlueHammer Windows Defender local privilege escalation vulnerability. This repo includes bug fixes, 7 Sigma rules, 4 YARA rules, and MITRE ATT&CK-mapped technical report

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.title: 📝 cmprmsd/BusyBOF (43 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: cmprmsd

📝 Repository: cmprmsd/BusyBOF

📄 Descrizione: Busybox-style Beacon Object Files for *nix post-exploitation. Reimplements common Unix utilities as BOFs for use in stripped environments (Docker containers, Kubernetes pods, minimal VMs) where no binaries exist beyond the agent / implant.

⭐ Stelle: 43

🍴 Forks: 4

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

item.description:
👤 Owner: tr4m0ryp

📝 Repository: tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass

📄 Descrizione: Free, open-source iCloud activation lock bypass tool. Remove iCloud lock from iPhone 5s through iPhone 15 Pro (iOS 12-26.1). Fully offline -- no servers, no payments. Supports checkm8 (A5-A11) and session activation (A12+).

⭐ Stelle: 13

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: activation-lock apple bypass-tool checkm8 dfu icloud-bypass ios iphone jailbreak security-research
